text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ooooohh... I really thought I could win.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I feel like I'm not being perceptive enough...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure if I can fix that, things will turn out
differently. So...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
For all of the hard work you've put in for me, I'm
going to work even harder in return!
choice_data_list: You didn't win, but it was still a great race!
Let's use this as motivation for next time!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're always looking at me with those sparkling
eyes of yours—no matter how things turn out.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how you'll look at me when I nab first
place.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll work hard to win next time so I get to
see that amazing smile.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Next time, I'll run even faster and
make sure to take first place.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll tackle any training you bring just to make you
happy! ♪
